transcript.clean_text: going into the cobbles day of reckoning it would be yumbo visma who would light up the tour de france wildfin art producing one of the performances of the century going away attacking and holding off a chasing peloton for 10 kilometers increasing his lead in the yellow jersey and winning a stage with the famous jersey over his shoulders 25 seconds over ivlan park now the belgians lead today still the best to the rest and the main gc contenders remaining two in a white jersey so after the journey to calais everybody moved to lille and the day that they've been wrecking worrying about and seeing the nerves build up for months on end bogata looked relaxed but vernat certainly was the stage would leave lille and for 157 kilometers weave its way down to the gates to the arenberg trench lil metropole to ahamberg 11 cobbled sectors 19 kilometers of the nasty rube type stones all in the second half of the race a day where the tour could certainly be lost an opportunity to get away from the chaos for nielsen paulus sitting pretty in the general classification and up there as part of a six-man group they take a decent enough advantage but nothing too big behind however there'd be problems for watfornat the race leader a big panic as he would crash check himself out get back on the bike and then almost crash again for not having a shaky down it'd be a sign of things to come for jumbo fisma into the final eight decays and onto the first sector of cobbles magnus caught in the breakaway yet again a fourth day in succession simon clark taco vonderhorn alexey gujar also there as well edward wassenhagen the sixth name at the head of the race alberto betiol surprising some doing very hard turns just in front of tadepogacha the first gc man to be in serious trouble would be ben o'connor a puncture meaning he would lose time matchup on the pool not quite up to it one of the big surprises of the day and then panic stations for jonas finger having to change a bike getting one that was too big for him then one from the car and walt fernat would drop back to try and help him the race leader sacrificing his own opportunities to win the stage to pull for the danish co-leader several other riders were called out at this point and then there was an issue too for primars roglic yamavisma having to split their team in two both of their leaders off the back meanwhile at the front taday pogachar was on a rampage proving yet again there is nothing that he cannot do in this sport the breakaway were looking good with an opportunity to take the stage over a minute of a gap in the front and still working brilliantly well together with 25ks to go bulgacha would be off the front of the rest a crash behind but with starvin the gap down to 40 seconds and an opportunity maybe even to reach the front the race all over the place chaos on the roads away from rube heading towards irenberg with 10 kilometers remaining it became clear that the breakaway was going to take the day today was putting in plenty of time to his rivals but fernat would give everything he had his own jersey to defend but more importantly vingagor to try and pull back thomas yates godu quintana plenty more in this group as well now to the stage win nielsen palace attacked with just over a kilometer to go he'd be caught by boss and hagen who did the chasing the total nlg man out of gas though with takavada horn the man to launch the sprint first trying to do exactly what he did at the giro simon clark almost looked beaten but the man from israel with a bike throw the team's first ever tour de france stage win in a photo finish and clark just a few days short of his 36th birthday getting his first ever tour de france stage win bulgachar in 52 seconds fanart and company doing a wonderful job though to limit the losses and they come in just over a minute down from the winner so time loss for many gc riders flashove in the main group too some would lose more including primoge roglich but it'd be all celebrations for israel premier tech an historic day for simon clark and the team a reminder that clark didn't have a contract during the winter until he got the call today he got the call to be in the break and he beat fond du horn watson hagen paulus and court with starvin pogacad phillips jacobser and mozarto all in the days top 10 separated by a minute and four seconds despite all of his hard work for his teammate swat fanart did manage to keep the yellow jersey he still leads the tour de france going into stage six the stage will start with a redesigned general classification fanart ahead of paulus wassenhagen pogato and lampard okay right thomas up at 50 seconds now pogancha's time games not huge but he certainly asserted himself on the cobbles and looks the race favorite stage six will take the riders from bash to long we it's a long road to long wheat almost 220 kilometers a departure from belgium heading back into france and with an uphill finish categorized climbs towards the end a difficult one this stage winners and general classification contenders will have to be wary for any time gaps at the end and a reminder you'll better watch it on gcn plus where you can also see the girodone which is live each and every day you you you
